text.title: Exploratory Testing Charters Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Exploratory Testing Charters output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: mission statement: 'Explore X with Y to find Z'

forbidden.pattern: charter is missing OR not mission-shaped

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: charter populated with a typed value
session_duration_min populated with a typed value
heuristics_used populated with a typed value
bugs_found populated with a typed value
debrief_text populated with a typed value
pair_or_solo populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
